title: PopManko Christmas Crafts for Kids, 10 Pack Christmas Arts and Crafts Gifts for Kids, Xmas Activities Foam Stickers Craft Kits Party Bag Fillers Make Your Own Christmas Decorations (Christmas)
features: 【Christmas Crafts for Kids】These Christmas craft kits for kids includes 10 packs in total (10 assorted designs, 1pcs per design), cute designs and bright colour. A lot of foam stickers enough quantity to meet needs on a Christmas activity for kids, kids can make their own Xmas decorations ornament for house. Make your Christmas more interesting! In addition, there are 10pcs hanging ribbons in the package.

【Christmas Activity for Kids】Our Christmas arts and crafts adopt self-adhesive EVA foam material and are cutted in advance. Children only need to peel it off and stick on the paper card. Then hanging the ornament decorate their Christmas. These Christmas crafts can bring children more fun in Christmas party.

【High Quality Material】Our Xmas craft kits are made of premium EVA foam material (Thickness 2.5mm). The templates are made of 300GSM papercard. It can be pasted and peeled off multiple times, which is soft and lightweight. These mini Christmas craft kits are funny and simple items to enrich your kids' holiday season life.

【Make Your Own Christmas Ornament】These creative Christmas craft kits are great for improving dexterity and hand eye coordination. Design their own unique crafts, and hanging creating festival atmosphere in your house ,it a great Christmas decorations for kids.

【Easy to Use】Each Christmas crafts kit includes paper templates, self-adhesive EVA foam ornaments, and 12pcs hanging ribbons. Paste the sticker according to the shape of the card and finished product graphics, it is very simple. No glue or scissors required.
description: Specification: Colour: Multicolour Material: EVA Foam and 350GSM Paper Card Size: As the picture shows Package includes: 10 x Christmas crafts kits 10 x Ribbons 1 x Instruction Steps to Use: 1. Remove the backing paper from the sticker. 2. Paste the foam stickers on the template as your idea. 3. Pass ribbon through the small hole in the template. 4. A funny Christmas craft is ready!

specifications_table.Included Components: Christmas crafts kits, ribbons, instruction manual
